title: Add a way to disable SELinux labeling
body:
This allows using OCI runtimes with a different security model (like
Kata), without rebuilding libpod nor disabling SELinux system-wide.

Signed-off-by: Sergio Lopez <slp@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
We already have a PR for this, which is being debated. https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/1406

> We already have a PR for this, which is being debated. #1406

Ouch. Closing this PR. Sorry.
I have no issue with the concept, but I still think libpod.conf is the wrong place.
